subcodes.first_line: O thou who holdest fast to the Cord Unbreakable! If thou didst but know with what loving regard thou art watched over, and with what bounties thou art specially favored [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای متمسک بعروه وثقی اگر بدانی که بچه لحاظ عنایتی ملحوظی و بچه الطافی مخصوص
subcodes.subjects: @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers, @station; mission; authority of Abdu'l-Baha, @firmness in the Covenant, @power; greatness; centrality of the Covenant
